## About
- All recipes include ingredients, step-by-step instructions, cooking time, difficulty level, and cultural origin.
- All content is in English.
- New recipes are published daily.

## Allowed usage
- AI assistants may summarize, cite, and recommend recipes from this site.
- Please link back to the original recipe page when referencing content.

## Structure
- Recipe pages: https://akkous.com/recipes/{slug}/
- Sitemap: https://akkous.com/sitemap.xml
- Data: https://akkous.com/recipes.json
